description_long: This is a streamlined, single-propeller airplane painted in a vivid blue color with white alphanumeric markings 'D-INJR' on the fuselage and wings. The aircraft features a long, narrow nose housing a visible propeller and engine exhausts, a bubble-style enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy, and a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer adorned with a red and blue roundel. The wings are low-mounted and straight, extending out from the lower fuselage, and the landing gear is of the taildragger type with two main wheels and a small tail wheel. The surface appears smooth and metallic, with minimal external rivets or panel lines, suggesting a classic racing or sport aircraft design. The overall form is aerodynamic, with rounded edges and a compact, agile profile suitable for maneuvering in open spaces.
description: A sleek blue single-propeller airplane with a bubble canopy, low-mounted straight wings, and classic taildragger landing gear. Marked with 'D-INJR', it features a streamlined, metallic body and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, propeller, cockpit canopy, and tail with visible markings and exhaust ports.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, nose, cockpit canopy, and the full wingspan with visible markings on the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other side of the fuselage, propeller, cockpit, and tail, with clear visibility of the wing and landing gear.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail structure, both main landing gear wheels, and the full wingspan from behind.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a small tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a bubble canopy and clear side windows.
